## Type of Change
- [ ] Feature / Content
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Docs / Config
- [ ] SEO change

## SEO Impact
- [ ] No SEO impact
- [ ] New page added (sitemap updated?)
- [ ] Page removed (301 redirect added?)
- [ ] Meta tags / structured data changed

## Risk Assessment
- [ ] Low — copy or styling change
- [ ] Medium — new page or component
- [ ] High — layout restructure or SEO-impacting change

## Definition of Done
- [ ] `npm run build` succeeds
- [ ] Lighthouse score > 90 on changed pages
- [ ] All pages have title, meta description, OG tags
- [ ] No `noindex` directives introduced
- [ ] Cookie consent still functional
- [ ] Tested in both languages (EN/ES)
